name: Reflex Cat Meaty Stick Treat With Turkey And Lamb 15g
description: Delight your cat with a wholesome, protein-rich reward made to satisfy natural carnivorous instincts. Meaty Sticks for Adult Cats with Turkey & Lamb are crafted with an exceptional 95% meat and animal derivatives , delivering outstanding taste and nutrition in every bite. This grain-free recipe combines tender turkey (26%) and flavorful lamb (14%) , creating an irresistible snack that’s both delicious and easy to digest. With a high 41% crude protein content , these sticks help support strong muscles and overall vitality, while the soft texture makes them easy to chew and portion. Perfect as an occasional treat or reward, Meaty Sticks are a nutritious way to spoil your cat while responsibly complementing their daily diet. Key Benefits 95% high-quality meat content With turkey & lamb for rich, natural flavor Grain-free formula for sensitive digestion High protein to support muscle maintenance Soft, easy-to-feed reward sticks Ideal as a treat or snack between meals Feed as a treat. Always adjust your cat’s total diet accordingly.
